Roblox Developer
About

Who is czunn?

A Roblox developer who builds real, polished experiences. Currently shipping Steal Dinosaurs From The Brainrots under the Pixlands group — from the scripting architecture to the game feel, every part built by hand.

Lua / Luau
Server, client, module scripts. Full-stack Roblox scripting with clean architecture.
Game Design
Tycoon loops, steal mechanics, idle systems, and progression that keeps players coming back.
Systems
DataStore, RemoteEvents, NPC combat, base ownership, custom GUIs.
Projects

Games I've Built

One game live on Roblox, built from the ground up.

Creator
Steal Dinosaurs From The Brainrots
To progress, steal dinosaurs from Brainrots, escape from angry Brainrots, and discover rare dinosaurs.
